query: scratched dusty old photograph damaged film emulsion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: scratched, dusty, damaged emulsion textures

response.objective_caption: A grayscale close-up of a textured wall surface showing faint, indistinct markings or stains, with a dark vertical edge along the left side suggesting a door frame or corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded grayscale close-up of a textured wall surface where faint, ghostly markings or stains barely emerge from near-total lack of detail, rendered with oppressive low contrast in washed-out faded tones that evoke damaged analog media or surveillance footage decay, making the subject nearly dissolve into murky ambiguity.
